content:
Hi everyone. A few things that I wanted to bring up:

大家好。有几件事我想提一下：

1. To ensure everyone can easily follow our <#1170692781216378960> , we need to keep this channel focused on just that. If you need to chat about something else, please move to the relevant channels. This helps make our community more efficient and enjoyable for all. 

Repeatedly breaking this rule will result in moderation action, such as a timeout, or a permanent ban from the server.

**仅限英语社区**


2. To help everyone find the right conversations, we're reorganizing our server.

Please grab your "language" role from <id:customize>. In the future, only people with the corresponding language role will be able to see and access those channels. This will make the channel list and interface of the server much user friendly for everyone!

**To make sure you can see all the channels relevant to you, please select your language role.**

We've also added a new "Ping Me/平我" role if you'd like to be notified about server news and updates, WIP content and Miscellaneous goodies.

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

2. 为了帮助大家找到合适的对话，我们正在重新组织服务器。

请从 <id:customize> 获取您的“语言”角色。未来，只有拥有相应语言角色的用户才能查看和访问这些频道。这将使服务器的频道列表和界面对所有用户更加友好！

**为确保您能看到所有与您相关的频道，请选择您的语言角色。**

我们还新增了一个“Ping Me/平我”角色，如果您想收到有关服务器新闻和更新、开发中内容以及其他福利的通知，可以使用该角色。

@everyone
